name: RGPD Compliance
description: GDPR / RGPD compliance toolkit for ChurchCRM: data subject access requests, right to erasure, processing register, retention policy.
author: Eoles Conseil

settings.label: Enable GDPR features
settings.help: Master switch. When off, the plugin is loaded but its UI is hidden and audit logging is paused.

settings.label: DPO full name
settings.help: Name of the Data Protection Officer signing GDPR requests for the church.

settings.label: DPO contact email
settings.help: Email address data subjects can use to contact the DPO. Appended to every DSAR export.

settings.label: Retention period after deactivation (years)
settings.help: How long deactivated person records remain visible to administrators before becoming DPO-only. Defaults to 2 years.
